subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1915-03-18
subcodes.first_line: I am straining my ears toward the city of Shiraz--the sacred birthplace of the Báb--that perchance I may hear the sweet rapturous songs of its inhabitants.
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @literature; drama; humanities; the arts, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise of Eastern values; culture
